ddt:Target.Name: N_B02E_HVAC_UDS_20170425
ddt:Target.Description:
[3] 2017/04/25 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Modified Auto-identificastion tag.
[2] Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Added Failures.
[1] XX2 S.shiota 2015/11/17 $4031 Request Add[B02E]
[N]New Create 2014/08/19 H.Yokoyama

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DataRead_$22402F_#4_TARGET EVAPORATOR TEMP UPPER LIMIT SETTING
DataWrite_$2E0C84_#4_TARGET EVAPORATOR TEMP UPPER LIMIT SETTING
DataRead.FFD_$224023_#4_Reat Internal temperature sensor calculated value
DataRead.FFD_$224024_#4_Rear Intake temperature sensor calculated value
DataRead_$22402C_#4_bit6_Set thepresence of air distribution to DEF during D/F1 mode

Item.Text: DEF door open when auto, DEF door closed when manual
DEF door open when auto, DEF door open when manual
DEF door closed when auto, DEF door open when manual
DEF door closed when auto, DEF door closed when manual

Data.Name: DataRead_$22402E_#4_bit6_Set operation for when SW for CleanAirVehicle is operated

Item.Text: Do not accept CAV SW operations
"Do not turn ON compressor Do not accept CAV SW operations"

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$224028_#4_bit6_Rear Blower fan DUTY or voltage
DataRead.$22400E_#4_Passenger side internal temperature sensor calculated value (8 bit)
DataRead.$224011_#4_Passenger side insolation sensor calculated value (8 bit)
DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

DataItem.Name: DataWrite_$2E0C84_#4_TARGET EVAPORATOR TEMP UPPER LIMIT SETTING
DataRead.FFD_$224023_#4_Reat Internal temperature sensor calculated value
DataRead.FFD_$224024_#4_Rear Intake temperature sensor calculated value
DataRead.FFD_$224028_#4_bit6_Rear Blower fan DUTY or voltage
DataRead_$22402E_#4_bit6_Set operation for when SW for CleanAirVehicle is operated
DataRead_$22402C_#4_bit6_Set thepresence of air distribution to DEF during D/F1 mode
DataRead_$22402F_#4_TARGET EVAPORATOR TEMP UPPER LIMIT SETTING
DataRead.$22400E_#4_Passenger side internal temperature sensor calculated value (8 bit)
DataRead.$224011_#4_Passenger side insolation sensor calculated value (8 bit)
